forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 59, with temperatures falling to around 57 in the afternoon. East northeast wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 11pm. Cloudy. Low around 52, with temperatures rising to around 55 overnight. West wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Rain Showers
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 1pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 76, with temperatures falling to around 73 in the afternoon. South southwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 8pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. West wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
